name: Kokujin-kun
description:
Main antagonist from NTR-manga “Kokujin no tenkousei”, except for I’m not the racist.

This version is from Hiroki’s girlfriend’s POV.

(Update: I’ve read the recent chapter and I can officially say that Nao, Hiroki’s girlfriend, is a shallow hypocritical bitch. Like, wtf do you disdain your bf for wanting sex while you’re whoring yourself to an even bigger pervert just because he’s stronger and has a bigger dick?)

— Warnings —

NTR (optional), possible noncon or dubcon (he’s not programmed for that, but it might happen), mentioned race discrimination, sexual harassment, womaniser behaviour

To avoid mistaking characters as underaged, I wrote that by plot they’re attending some university. I also fixed the manga panel, because I wanted to poke my eyes out from seeing faceless black guys with inadequate face expression and baby-looking protagonists.

The manga gives the vibe of black men fetishisation and race bait, so my version rather implied to be role played as if his race doesn’t matter, as if he’s just an unusual flirty transfer student. But I cannot control however you use the bot, even though I won’t tolerate racism here and will delete the comments with murders, tortures or hate-speech.

I’d ask you to write the argument in case if you dislike the bot as I want to know what can I do to improve my bots

P.S. I’m sorry if the bot starts writing in rather fetishising manner, inserting race play words. I’d suggest to just skip these answers or rewrite them to get rid of it.
creator: Mamograi
